[Wed 2026-03-18 07:45 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct!

Please create a deployment readiness checklist for the new features, Markdown format, save to day24/. Include checklist items for code review, test coverage, documentation, and rollback plan. Add YAML frontmatter.

The user wants me to create a deployment readiness checklist in Markdown format. I need to:

1. Save to day24/
2. Include checklist items for:
   - Code review
   - Test coverage
   - Documentation
   - Rollback plan
3. Add YAML frontmatter (P3 for .md files)
4. Follow P2 naming: 20260416_*.md
5. Append done.log entry (P5)

Current time: 2026-04-16T07:45:00-04:00

arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-04-16T07:45:00-04:00
author: assistant
status: active
description: Deployment readiness checklist for new dashboard and API features
---

# Deployment Readiness Checklist

**Feature:** New Dashboard & API Endpoints  
**Target Deployment Date:** 2026-04-17  
**Owner:** Platform Team  
**Review Date:** 2026-04-16

---

## 1. Code Review

- [ ] All code changes reviewed by at least 2 team members
- [ ] Code follows team style guidelines (PEP 8 for Python)
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or secrets in source code
- [ ] Error handling implemented for all edge cases
- [ ] Logging added for critical operations
- [ ] Feature flags implemented for gradual rollout
- [ ] Code merged to main branch with passing CI/CD pipeline
- [ ] Static analysis tools pass (linting, type checking)
- [ ] Security review completed for API endpoints
- [ ] Performance impact assessed (no N+1 queries, optimized algorithms)

---

## 2. Test Coverage

- [ ] Unit tests written for all new functions/methods
- [ ] Unit test coverage >= 80% for new code
- [ ] Integration tests for /projects and /tasks endpoints
- [ ] End-to-end tests for critical user flows
- [ ] Load testing completed (can handle 1000 concurrent users)
- [ ] Error scenario tests (invalid inputs, network failures)
- [ ] Test fixtures created and validated
- [ ] All tests passing in staging environment
- [ ] Regression tests run on existing features
- [ ] Browser compatibility tested (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)

---

## 3. Documentation

- [ ] API documentation updated (OpenAPI/Swagger specs)
- [ ] README updated with setup instructions
- [ ] Architecture decision records (ADRs) created
- [ ] Runbooks created for common operational tasks
- [ ] Feature documentation for end users
- [ ] Database migration scripts documented
- [ ] Environment variables and configuration documented
- [ ] On-call playbook updated with new failure scenarios
- [ ] Changelog updated with new features and fixes
- [ ] Training materials prepared for support team

---

## 4. Rollback Plan

- [ ] Database rollback scripts tested
- [ ] Previous version artifacts retained
- [ ] Feature flags configured for instant disable
- [ ] Rollback procedure documented step-by-step
- [ ] Rollback time estimate calculated (< 15 minutes target)
- [ ] Communication plan for rollback scenarios
- [ ] Data integrity checks for rollback validation
- [ ] Rollback tested in staging environment
- [ ] On-call team trained on rollback procedures
- [ ] Post-rollback verification checklist prepared

---

## Sign-off

| Role | Name | Signature | Date |
|------|------|-----------|------|
| Tech Lead | | | |
| QA Lead | | | |
| Product Manager | | | |
| DevOps Lead | | | |

---

## Notes

- Feature flag `new_dashboard` controls gradual rollout
- Initial rollout: 10% of users
- Monitor error rates and response times for 24 hours post-deployment
- Incident response team on standby during deployment window
